reaction_guidance.summary:
Initial NaOH charge: 702.0 g (17.5513 mol)
CO2 absorbed to date: 575.1 g (13.0672 mol)
Ledger -> Na2CO3 4.4841 mol, NaHCO3 8.5830 mol, dissolved CO2 0.0000 mol
Add 192.84 g CO2 (4.3817 mol) to approach pH 8.10 (predicted ~= 8.13).
